title: CrosshairUtils
body:
# CrosshairUtils

A mod adding useful settings for your crosshair.
![The mod's base config screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b401762431ca5a952ab1be09054cb469561a1d4d.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/945f4f2c9d59579ae34ddc202a87ce0c5c70ca96.png)

## Features

- Custom crosshair color
- Custom attack indicator color
- Custom crosshair blend mode
- Customizable crosshair shape
- Customize crosshair shape for looking at entities/blocks
- Ability to draw your own crosshair
![Screenshot of crosshair drawing screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81d3919fe76d4f8d4d648f6a63e02003dd6219fe.png)
